svg.text: Six collectors run in sequence, each rate-limited at
NBA.com throttling. All data persists to SQLite.
Pivots 11 play types x Off/Def into
percentile ranks across all 30 teams. Scored against
scheme templates. PPP inversion: low PPP = good D.
Hungarian algorithm matches centroids to z-score direction vector templates for label assignment.
+ Shared: reb x 0.8, NRtg x 0.8, mpg x 0.3
Every player gets a Dynamic Score (40-99).
poor D still rate highly — known bias.
Used as input to DSI team-level aggregation below.
DSI = weighted avg of player DS
The DSI model blends two independent signals:
Aggregates player-level DS into team power.
Stabilizes the model against small-sample DSI noise.
Edge = Projected Spread - Market Line. Positive edge = value bet.
Badges: Hot / Up / Down / Cold / Steady
only, not full season). Browser-spoofed headers.
All data baked in. No client-side API calls. ~263 KB.
